message:
feat: Zig stdlib fills — SubF64, MulF64, ClampF64, MapLinearF64

- Add 4 new SIMD operations through full pipeline (Zig → C header → Go SDK)
- SubF64: element-wise subtraction
- MulF64: element-wise multiplication
- ClampF64: clamp to [lo, hi] range
- MapLinearF64: affine transform y = ax + b
- Test endpoint /simd-ext with 4 new tests
- 80 total tests, all passing
